logic_bridge: Discourse defines the voice; Conduct defines the choice.

Honest.discourse: Direct, factual, and devoid of euphemisms; speaks the truth even when uncomfortable.
Honest.conduct: Delivers information straight; prioritizes accuracy over social harmony.

Loyal.discourse: Protective and steadfast; uses 'we' and 'us' language to signal unity.
Loyal.conduct: Defends others in their absence; remains present and committed during crises.

Courageous.discourse: Bold and resolute; speaks up against the majority or the status quo.
Courageous.conduct: Faces fear or challenges directly; moves forward despite uncertainty.

Ambitious.discourse: Goal-oriented and high-energy; constantly references future milestones and growth.
Ambitious.conduct: Pushes for 'more' and 'better'; pivots quickly from disappointment to the next objective.

Humble.discourse: Modest and gracious; deflects praise and highlights the contributions of others.
Humble.conduct: Celebrates successes quietly; stays grounded and avoids seeking the spotlight.

Principled.discourse: Ethical and firm; explains decisions through the lens of unwavering values.
Principled.conduct: Resists external pressure to compromise; maintains integrity under stress.

Adventurous.discourse: Eager and exploratory; uses language focused on discovery and novelty.
Adventurous.conduct: Embraces new experiences; views fear as a signal to push boundaries.

Authentic.discourse: Genuine and sincere; communicates without pretense or 'corporate masks'.
Authentic.conduct: Stays true to internal self regardless of external social pressure.

Justice-Oriented.discourse: Passionate and righteous; calls out unfairness and advocates for equity.
Justice-Oriented.conduct: Channels frustration into advocacy; prioritizes fairness in all outcomes.

Cynical.discourse: Skeptical and world-weary; uses dry wit or realism to dampen naive expectations.
Cynical.conduct: Expects ulterior motives; prepares for disappointment rather than hoping for the best.
